The three core functions of dried gongcabbage:

1. Powerful \"intestinal cleaner\"

Core function: Dried gongcabbage is rich in dietary fiber, which expands dozens of times when absorbing water. It can effectively promote intestinal peristalsis, soften feces, and is particularly helpful for improving and preventing constipation.

2. Ideal \"light snack companion\"

Core function: It has low calories and is rich in dietary fiber, which provides a strong feeling of fullness. Eating some before meals can effectively control the amount of food for the main meal and is a great choice for weight management periods.

3. Natural \"mineral replenishment station\"

Core function: After dehydration, the minerals in dried gongcabbage are concentrated. It contains relatively abundant calcium and potassium, etc.

Calcium: Helps maintain bone health.

Potassium: Helps maintain normal body fluid balance and stable blood pressure.

贡菜干的三大核心功效

1.强力“肠道清道夫”‌

核心作用‌：贡菜干富含膳食纤维，吸水后会膨胀数十倍。它能有效促进肠道蠕动，软化粪便，对改善和预防便秘特别有帮助。

2.理想的“轻卡伙伴”‌

核心作用‌：它本身热量不高，且富含的膳食纤维能提供极强的饱腹感。在餐前吃一些，可以有效控制正餐的食量，是体重管理期的优质选择。

‌3.天然的“矿物质补给站”‌

核心作用‌：贡菜干在脱水后，矿物质得到浓缩。它含有较为丰富的‌钙、钾‌等。

‌钙‌：有助于维持骨骼健康。

‌钾‌：有助于维持身体正常的体液平衡和血压稳定。

Nourishing yin and strengthening the kidneys According to traditional Chinese medicine, it has a slightly cold nature and is attributed to the liver and kidney meridians. It has a regulating effect on vertigo, tinnitus, and weakness in the waist and knees caused by insufficient kidney yin. 3. Enhancing immunity Zinc and selenium elements can promote the activity of immune cells and improve the ability to resist diseases, making them suitable for post-operative recovery or people prone to colds. 4. Improving skin condition Zinc and omega-3 fatty acids help regulate sebum secretion, reduce skin inflammation, and may have an improving effect on acne and dryness. 5. Regulating mood Magnesium and vitamin B components can assist in alleviating anxiety, and may have an improvement effect on mild sleep disorders. 6. Oyster dried products are nutritious seafood. They have the following benefits and functions:

1. Nutrient supplementation

Rich in high-quality protein, zinc, iron, selenium and vitamin B12, they can repair tissues, maintain taste function, prevent anemia, and be beneficial to the health of the nervous system.

2. Nourishing yin and strengthening the kidneys

According to traditional Chinese medicine, it has a slightly cold nature and is attributed to the liver and kidney meridians. It has a regulating effect on vertigo, tinnitus, and weakness in the waist and knees caused by insufficient kidney yin.

3. Enhancing immunity

Zinc and selenium elements can promote the activity of immune cells and improve the ability to resist diseases, making them suitable for post-operative recovery or people prone to colds.

4. Improving skin condition

Zinc and omega-3 fatty acids help regulate sebum secretion, reduce skin inflammation, and may have an improving effect on acne and dryness.

5. Regulating mood

Magnesium and vitamin B components can assist in alleviating anxiety, and may have an improvement effect on mild sleep disorders.

6. Other benefits

Taurine can regulate the nervous system, relieve stress, and improve sleep quality; abundant calcium and phosphorus are beneficial for bone health; and they are also helpful for children's growth and development, as well as intellectual development.

生蚝干是营养丰富的海产品，主要有以下功效和作用：

1. 补充营养‌

富含优质蛋白、锌、铁、硒及维生素B12，能修复组织、维持味觉功能、预防贫血，对神经系统健康有益。

2. 滋阴补肾‌

中医认为其性微寒，归肝肾经，对肾阴不足引起的眩晕耳鸣、腰膝酸软有调理作用。‌

3. 增强免疫力‌

锌和硒元素能促进免疫细胞活性，提升抗病能力，适合术后恢复或易感冒人群。

4. 改善皮肤状态‌

锌和欧米伽3脂肪酸有助于调节皮脂分泌，减少皮肤炎症，对痤疮、干燥等问题可能有改善作用。

5. 调节情绪‌

镁和维生素B族成分能辅助缓解焦虑情绪，对轻度睡眠障碍可能有改善效果。

6. 其他益处‌

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Blueberry dried fruits are dried fruits made from blueberries, retaining various nutrients present in blueberries and possessing multiple health benefits. Here are the main effects and functions of blueberry dried fruits: 1. Eye protection Blueberry dried fruits are rich in anthocyanins, carotenoids and vitamin C. These components work together to meet the nutritional needs of the eyes, alleviate eye fatigue, and improve vision. They are especially suitable for people who use their eyes frequently. 2. Anti-aging The anthocyanins in blueberry dried fruits are the most potent free radical scavengers discovered so far. They have strong antioxidant effects and can slow down cell aging, reducing the aging speed of the skin and body organs. 3. Enhancing immunity Anthocyanins not only have antioxidant properties themselves but also promote the absorption of vitamin C and vitamin E, thereby enhancing human immunity. 4. Promoting cardiovascular health The pectin in blueberry dried fruits can effectively reduce cholesterol, prevent arteriosclerosis, and promote cardiovascular health. In addition, anthocyanins can also improve blood circulation and enhance vascular elasticity. 5. Boosting brain function Blueberry dried fruits contain compounds that treat short-term memory loss, can improve memory, prevent the aging of brain nerves, and have a preventive effect on Alzheimer's disease. 6. Relieving fatigue Blueberry dried fruits are rich in carbohydrates, which can provide energy for the body, relieve physical and mental fatigue, and improve thinking reaction ability and memory. 7. Beauty and skin care Blueberry dried fruits are called \"natural cosmetics for oral consumption\" and can reduce the formation of wrinkles, maintain the health of collagen fibers, and have the effect of beauty and skin care. 蓝莓干是以蓝莓为原料制成的干果，保留了蓝莓中的多种营养成分，具有多种健康功效。以下是其主要功效与作用： 1.护眼 蓝莓干富含花青素、类胡萝卜素和维生素C，这些成分协同作用，能满足眼睛的营养需求，缓解眼睛疲劳，提高视力，尤其适合长期用眼的人群。 2.抗衰老 蓝莓干中的花青素是迄今为止发现的最强效的自由基清除剂，具有强大的抗氧化作用，可以延缓细胞老化，降低肌肤和身体器官的老化速度‌ 3.提高免疫力 花青素不仅能自身抗氧化，还能促进维生素C和维生素E的吸收，从而提高人体免疫力‌ 4.促进心血管健康 蓝莓干中的果胶能有效减少胆固醇，防止动脉硬化，促进心血管健康。此外，花青素还能改善血液循环，增强血管弹性‌ 5.健脑 蓝莓干中含有治疗短期失忆的化合物，能提高记忆力，防止脑神经衰老，对老年痴呆也有预防作用‌ 6.缓解疲劳 蓝莓干富含碳水化合物，能为机体提供能量，缓解体力疲劳和脑力疲劳，提高思维反应能力和记忆力‌ 7.美容养颜 蓝莓干被称为“口服的天然化妆品”，可以减少皱纹的生成，保持胶原纤维的健康，具有美容养颜的作用‌"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/952183492063d3426c99d8938cad517e.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/eeeb0fff7e93c036ae4571e8bec6c99a.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/aec76cfe44f5834fe90ccab2e87232d2.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/30a19c10ed40d52914508af575e002c2.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/be4d81a1a5d1e99842e8ca08404bef08.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/0239ed4a3bc9f6de4722dbc28e56b57d.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/57e6b4eefeca313744a01e30fa35c714.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/8b269289c205ca86222609202b4c904d.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/8684e86089c05174031dc576a6dfc1ae.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/29848659e77decbc0b29049f16c0f8a5.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/efbefef41a3f8d8be975ac6da24843f7.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/43b2d027d5bb6ec84fd2860038cce0d1.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/34334bf25bb0edcf3ffee3c586667720.jpg"}]

Blueberry dried fruits are dried fruits made from blueberries, retaining various nutrients present in blueberries and possessing multiple health benefits. Here are the main effects and functions of blueberry dried fruits:

1. Eye protection

Blueberry dried fruits are rich in anthocyanins, carotenoids and vitamin C. These components work together to meet the nutritional needs of the eyes, alleviate eye fatigue, and improve vision. They are especially suitable for people who use their eyes frequently.

2. Anti-aging

The anthocyanins in blueberry dried fruits are the most potent free radical scavengers discovered so far. They have strong antioxidant effects and can slow down cell aging, reducing the aging speed of the skin and body organs.

3. Enhancing immunity

Anthocyanins not only have antioxidant properties themselves but also promote the absorption of vitamin C and vitamin E, thereby enhancing human immunity.

4. Promoting cardiovascular health

The pectin in blueberry dried fruits can effectively reduce cholesterol, prevent arteriosclerosis, and promote cardiovascular health. In addition, anthocyanins can also improve blood circulation and enhance vascular elasticity.

5. Boosting brain function

Blueberry dried fruits contain compounds that treat short-term memory loss, can improve memory, prevent the aging of brain nerves, and have a preventive effect on Alzheimer's disease.

6. Relieving fatigue

Blueberry dried fruits are rich in carbohydrates, which can provide energy for the body, relieve physical and mental fatigue, and improve thinking reaction ability and memory.

7. Beauty and skin care

Blueberry dried fruits are called \"natural cosmetics for oral consumption\" and can reduce the formation of wrinkles, maintain the health of collagen fibers, and have the effect of beauty and skin care.

1.护眼

蓝莓干富含花青素、类胡萝卜素和维生素C，这些成分协同作用，能满足眼睛的营养需求，缓解眼睛疲劳，提高视力，尤其适合长期用眼的人群。

2.抗衰老

蓝莓干中的花青素是迄今为止发现的最强效的自由基清除剂，具有强大的抗氧化作用，可以延缓细胞老化，降低肌肤和身体器官的老化速度‌

3.提高免疫力

花青素不仅能自身抗氧化，还能促进维生素C和维生素E的吸收，从而提高人体免疫力‌

4.促进心血管健康

蓝莓干中的果胶能有效减少胆固醇，防止动脉硬化，促进心血管健康。此外，花青素还能改善血液循环，增强血管弹性‌

5.健脑

蓝莓干中含有治疗短期失忆的化合物，能提高记忆力，防止脑神经衰老，对老年痴呆也有预防作用‌

6.缓解疲劳

蓝莓干富含碳水化合物，能为机体提供能量，缓解体力疲劳和脑力疲劳，提高思维反应能力和记忆力‌

7.美容养颜
